bug_report.summary: Editor dock/layout state differs after restart at 200% scale (FileSystem dock expanded / panel sizing changes) without user interaction
steps_to_reproduce: Launch editor and open the project.
Reopen the same project and wait for the editor to finish loading.
expected_behaviors: After restart and load completion, the editor should restore the same default dock layout/state (e.g., FileSystem dock collapsed/expanded state and panel sizes) consistently between builds/runs when no layout changes were made by the user.
actual_behaviors: After the code change, once the editor finishes restarting/loading, the UI layout/state differs from before: the FileSystem dock appears expanded (showing navigation arrows and the res:// path field) and overall dock/viewport sizing differs, despite no user action to change layout during this step.
